prs.title: Login fixes: Component refactoring and email verification fix
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small set of minor fixes and component tweaks across 5 files with only 11 custom lines added, indicating simple bug fixes and lightweight refactoring.

prs.title: Ch/gap analysis
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Massive AI gap analysis feature spanning 111 files and 5666 custom lines, introducing a full agent architecture, multiple AI assessors, and numerous domain-specific evaluation modules representing weeks of transformative work.

prs.title: Release: Admin & Task Management Improvements
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Significant addition of 567 lines across 8 files covering admin task management, company pages, readiness logs, and task UI components, representing a meaningful multi-area feature release.

prs.title: Admin & Task Management Improvements - Impersonation Fixes
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Identical file set and line count to PR #3, indicating this is the same substantial admin and task management work likely rebased or staged with impersonation fixes included, warranting the same medium-large score.

stories.name: AI-Powered Gap Analysis
stories.rationale: Delivered the core gap analysis AI agent capability, enabling the platform to identify and surface business readiness gaps for users.

stories.name: Admin Controls & Task Management Enhancements
stories.rationale: Improved admin tooling and task management workflows, including fixes to user impersonation functionality to support internal operations and support teams.

stories.name: Login & Authentication Experience Fixes
stories.rationale: Resolved login flow issues including component refactoring and email verification bugs to improve the user onboarding and authentication experience.
